title: ydata-profiling
summary:
Create HTML profiling reports from pandas DataFrame objects 
 Documentation Discord Stack Overflow Latest changelog Do you like this project? Show us your love and give feedback! ydata-profiling primary goal is to provide a one-line Exploratory Data Analysis EDA experience in a consistent and fast solution. Like pandas df.describe function, that is so handy, ydata-profiling delivers an extended analysis of a DataFrame while allowing the data analysis to be exported in different formats such as h
